steps.title: Identify the key overlap
steps.content: Both mountain ranges are classified as “sky inlands” in the notes—the shared category that unites them.

steps.title: Match the choice that highlights unity
steps.content: B does this by making the main clause about what both ranges share: they're both isolated mountain ranges with environments that differ from their surroundings. A mentions multiple ranges generically; C emphasizes their different sizes (1,038 vs. 65 mi²); D acknowledges they're both sky inlands but then pivots to emphasize a difference in location as the main point instead. That matches choice B — B is correct.
